modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Training options for TeamDynamix Ticketing and Client Portal

full_description_text: El usuario pregunta sobre los videos de entrenamiento para TeamDynamix. No está claro qué tipo de entrenamiento hay disponible. Necesita información sobre el Ticketing y el Client Portal.
